description_long: This is a large, robust wooden storage crate constructed from weathered planks arranged horizontally and reinforced with diagonal wooden braces on each side. The wood displays a natural, slightly aged finish with visible grain, knots, and some minor surface imperfections, suggesting durability and outdoor suitability. One side of the crate features a prominent red biohazard warning sign, indicating that it may be used for hazardous or sensitive materials. The crate is box-shaped with a flat, plank-style top and no visible hinges, handles, or locking mechanisms. The construction appears solid, with metal fasteners at the corners for added strength. Its size and rugged build make it suitable for placement in urban environments such as warehouses, garages, or construction sites.
description: A large, weathered wooden storage crate with diagonal braces and a red biohazard warning sign on one side. The crate is sturdy, box-shaped, and designed for secure storage in urban settings.
description_view_0: This view shows a wooden crate face with diagonal bracing and visible wood grain, but no signage or labels.
description_view_1: This side displays a similar wooden plank construction with diagonal bracing, but remains unmarked and plain.
description_view_2: This view reveals the red biohazard warning sign on the lower left, distinguishing it from the other sides.
description_view_3: This face is plain with only the diagonal bracing and wood texture, lacking any signage or unique markings.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: red biohazard warning sign on one side
